title: Case File
description: Everything you need as a detective
story:
Victor Hale is dead.

A powerful tech entrepreneur, found lifeless in his own penthouse late at night.

No forced entry. No signs of struggle. Just a quiet, calculated murder.

You arrive at the scene. Something feels off.

Security logs confirm it—only three people had access to the penthouse that night.

And now, they sit before you.
howToPlay:
You are a detective.

You are given a story about a murder scene.

Three suspects stand before you.

Talk to each of them. Ask about their alibis, motives, and actions. Listen carefully and compare their stories.

Watch for contradictions. Notice what does not add up.

Clues appear as you dig deeper.

When you are ready, make your call.

Choose one suspect as the murderer.

You only get one chance.   nnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnn
